en.feedback_sat_fat: Oof, my arteries. That was delicious, but way too high in saturated fats. I need a nap.
en.feedback_low_protein: I'm still feeling a bit weak. This bowl didn't have nearly enough protein for my goals.
en.feedback_high_carbs: Carb coma! Way too heavy on the starches.
en.feedback_high_water: Did you drain a whole lake to make this? The water footprint on this bowl is massive.
en.feedback_high_land: A whole forest had to be cleared just to fit this meal on a plate. Not very sustainable.
en.feedback_perfect: Absolutely brilliant. You hit my macros perfectly, kept my heart healthy, and didn't destroy the planet doing it. A masterclass in sustainable nutrition!
en.feedback_fallback_animal: Not a bad bowl, but it could be optimized. We can easily make this healthier and more sustainable by swapping some of those animal products for whole plant foods next time.
en.feedback_fallback_plant: A decent plant-based attempt! The macros were a little bit off my exact targets, but I really appreciate the eco-friendly choices.
en.feedback_high_chicken: While chicken seems like a lean choice, its production has hidden ethical and environmental costs.
en.data_attribution: Powered by real-world data from Centre for Food Safety & Our World in Data

zh.feedback_sat_fat: 哎呀，雖然好好味，但飽和脂肪太高喇。
zh.feedback_low_protein: 好似周身冇乜力。今日嘅蛋白質遠遠未夠我嘅目標呀。
zh.feedback_high_carbs: 食飽有啲眼瞓！Carbs 係咪多咗啲？
zh.feedback_high_water: 今餐用咗幾多個泳池嘅水？Water footprint 有啲多喎。
zh.feedback_high_land: 為咗一餐飯，放棄一整個森林，值得咩？
zh.feedback_perfect: 正呀！你完美地達到了我嘅 Macro 營養目標，保住我心臟健康，又冇點破壞地球。簡直係可持續營養嘅典範！
zh.feedback_fallback_animal: 呢餐算唔錯啦，但可以再好啲。下次我哋不如用全植物飲食替代替動物產品，可以食得更健康、更可持續。
zh.feedback_fallback_plant: 一次唔錯嘅植物性嘗試！Marco 營養素同我的目標有少少偏差，但我欣賞你為環保做嘅選擇。
zh.feedback_high_chicken: 雖然雞肉睇落係一個健康嘅選擇，但佢嘅生產過程背後隱藏住道德同環境代價。
zh.data_attribution: 營養及環境數據分別源自食物安全中心與 Our World in Data
